name: Sour Cream Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut apples into thick slices.
2. Arrange the apple slices in overlapping rows in the pastry-lined pie pan.
3. Sprinkle the apple slices with lemon juice.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together sugar, flour, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Add butter and work it in until the mixture is crumbly.
5. Spoon the crumbly mixture over the apples.
6. Spread sour cream evenly over the top of the pie.
7. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F for 50 to 55 minutes, or until the apples are tender.
